zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多延续
zh.content:
当前价格6.45上方运行，稳站SMA20均线6.29之上，短线维持震荡上行结构，多头略占优势但动能放缓。

MACD柱值0.038维持正区间，动能仍偏多，但缺乏信号线参考，RSI缺失使超买判断不完整，整体呈温和上涨但需防动能衰减。

下方支撑关注6.43短期低点及6.29均线支撑，上方阻力集中6.53前高，突破后或打开6.60上行空间，需关注量能确认。

操作上建议区间交易为主，回踩6.30附近分批低吸，若放量突破6.53可顺势跟多，跌破6.29需止损观望控制风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase after a modest upward drift, with price action stabilizing above short-term support. The market structure shows a mild bullish bias as recent candles hold above the 20-day SMA. However, momentum remains limited, suggesting accumulation rather than breakout strength. Traders are observing whether price can sustain above the mid-range and challenge recent highs near the upper boundary of the intraday range.

Short-term indicators reinforce a cautiously bullish outlook. Price holding above the 20-day SMA at 6.29 suggests buyers maintain control of the trend floor. The MACD reading at 0.038 indicates positive momentum, though the absence of a confirmed signal line limits conviction. With RSI unavailable, momentum confirmation relies more heavily on price structure and moving averages, which currently favor gradual upward pressure rather than acceleration.

Immediate support is located near 6.43, aligning with the recent intraday low, followed by stronger structural support at the 20-day SMA around 6.29. A breakdown below this zone could expose deeper retracement toward 6.20. On the upside, resistance is defined by the 6.53 high, with a breakout potentially opening momentum toward 6.60 and beyond if volume expands and buyers sustain pressure.

Trading strategy favors a buy-the-dip approach within the current range, prioritizing entries near support zones while maintaining disciplined risk control. Long positions are more attractive while price holds above the 20-day SMA, with invalidation on a sustained break below 6.29. Aggressive traders may target range highs near 6.53, while breakout traders should wait for confirmed volume expansion above resistance before extending upside exposure.
